title: Policy Optimizer - Manage Port Based Rules
content:
This playbook migrates port-based rules to application-based allow rules to reduce the attack surface and safely enable applications on your network.

Cortex XSOAR/XSIAM SOAR playbook from the Maciej Drobniuch and Cortex XSOAR pack (PANOSPolicyOptimizer, community-supported).

Inputs — slack_user: Slack user to notify about port based rules.; email_address: User email address to notify about port based rules.; auto_commit: Specifies whether you want to auto-commit the configuration for the PAN-OS policy changes automatically (Yes/No)..

Integrations/scripts used: IsIntegrationAvailable, pan-os-delete-rule, pan-os-po-no-apps.

      description: |-
        This playbook edits rules with unused applications or rules that are port based, and adds an application to the rule. It includes communication tasks to get a rule name and the application to edit from the user.
      playbookName: Policy Optimizer - Add Applications to Policy Rules
      type: playbook
      iscommand: false
      brand: ""
    nexttasks:
      '#none#':
      - "23"
    scriptarguments:

          root: PanOS.PolicyOptimizer.NoApps
          accessor: '@name'
    separatecontext: true
    loop:
      iscommand: false
      builtincondition:
      - - operator: isEqualString
          left:
            value:
              complex:
                root: RulesToEdit
                transformers:
                - operator: toLowerCase
            iscontext: true
          right:
            value:
              simple: "no"
      exitCondition: ""
      wait: 1
      max: 100
